prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名2021年第48→2022年第58→2023年第59→2024年第61→2025年第54→202 6年第56，近年排名在50–60区间波动，整体稳定，属中上水平211；近年声誉信号无明显负面或正面事件；抖音热度未进入前100名榜单，关注度一般；未见投档 异常记录，综合判断为中性；该校传统优势为地质学、地质资源与地质工程（第四轮A+），与招生专业中的地质学类、地质类 等对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信等热门专业在该校招生计划中占一定比例，社会热度较高；地质类、环境类等传统专业热度一般；本省2026年考生总 数约535000人，较2025年大幅增加，按历史比例估算物理类考生约329025人（增长约15.5%），竞争显著加剧；该校位于湖北武汉，对四川考生属外省招生；近 年四川招生占比约2%–4%，地域偏好无明显偏向。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移趋势、2026年扩招约11.8%以及本省物理类考生大幅增长约15.5%三方面因素：扩招使 位次数字增大，考生增加进一步加剧竞争，两者叠加推动位次继续后移。预测最低位次约24641名，区间24141–25141名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 19849 → 20760 → 18625 → 22824, with significant fluctuations over the past 4 years. In 2024, it rebounded to 18625, but in 2025 it dropped sharply to 22824, a cumulative decline of about 2975 places; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 22824. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Sichuan was 117 in 2022, 116 in 2023, 115 in 2024, 127 in 2025, and 142 in 2026, an increase of about 11.8% compared to 2025. This expansion slightly eases competition, but the ranking numbers still tend to increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking was 48th in 2021 → 58th in 2022 → 59th in 2023 → 61st in 2024 → 54th in 2025 → 56th in 2026, fluctuating within the 50–60 range in recent years, overall stable, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; recent reputation signals show no significant negative or positive events; Douyin popularity did not enter the top 100 list, with average attention; no abnormal filing records observed, overall assessment is neutral; the university's traditional strengths are geology and geological resources and geological engineering (A+ in the fourth round), corresponding to majors such as geology and geological categories in the enrollment plan.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as computer science, electronics/information and communication account for a certain proportion of the university's enrollment plan, with high social popularity; traditional majors like geology and environment have average popularity; the total number of examinees in this province in 2026 is about 535,000, a significant increase from 2025. Based on historical proportions, it is estimated that there are about 329,025 physics category examinees (an increase of about 15.5%), significantly intensifying competition; the university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and is an out-of-province enrollment for Sichuan candidates; in recent years, the proportion of Sichuan enrollment is about 2%–4%, with no obvious regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the significant downward trend in rankings in 2025, the enrollment expansion of about 11.8% in 2026, and the substantial increase of about 15.5% in physics category examinees in this province: the expansion causes ranking numbers to increase, the increase in examinees further intensifies competition, and the two factors together push the ranking further downward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 24641, with a range of 24141–25141.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 24141–25141, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, Tier 1 majors (Computer Category, Electronic Information Category, Geology Base Class) can be used as sprint choices, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range, prioritize Tier 2 majors with broad employment prospects.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has been stable in the 50–60 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities, with a certain appeal to liberal arts students; there have been no significant negative or positive reputation events in recent years; its Douyin popularity has not entered the top 100 list, with average attention; overall assessment is neutral; the university's liberal arts enrollment majors mainly include economics, law, business administration, radio and television studies, English, etc., which are not in its traditional advantageous fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law and economics have a social popularity of differentiation/wait-and-see/recommendation, with fierce competition for popular liberal arts majors; the total number of examinees in this province in 2026 is about 535,000, with an estimated history category examinees of about 205,975 (an increase of about 15.7% from 177,978 in 2025), significantly intensifying competition; the university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, which is an out-of-province enrollment for Sichuan examinees; in recent years, the proportion of Sichuan liberal arts enrollment is about 1%–2%, with a small enrollment scale and no obvious regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the backward trend of rankings in 2025, the significant expansion of about 26.7% in 2026, and the substantial increase of about 15.7% in the number of history category examinees in this province: expansion causes the ranking number to increase, and the increase in examinees further intensifies competition, with both factors pushing the ranking to continue moving backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5163, with a range of 4663–5663.
